title: British-Style Pork Belly Stir Fry
description: A hearty and flavorful stir fry made with tender pork belly, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the pork belly and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and sliced ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Return the pork belly to the skillet and stir in the soy sauce and sugar.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Season with black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
